name: Bran Bites, Unbaked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine bran flakes, wheat germ, peanut butter, orange juice, honey, and raisins.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Shape the dough into balls using your hands.
4. Chill the balls for 2 to 3 days in a tightly-covered container to enhance flavor and texture.
5. Store the chilled balls in the refrigerator.
Note: About 24 balls can be made from this recipe.
